name: icp_fit_rate
definition: A-tier candidates divided by total candidates reviewed.
target_hint: ≥40% for narrow B2B ICPs; ≥25% acceptable for new categories. Below 15% = ICP too tight or wrong sources.

name: evidence_coverage
definition: Candidates with public source URL or repo signal divided by total candidates.
target_hint: 100%. Any candidate without evidence must be dropped or flagged.

name: why_now_rate
definition: A-tier candidates with documented trigger in last 90 days divided by A-tier total.
target_hint: ≥60% before outreach drafting. Below 40% = research pass incomplete.

name: source_diversity
definition: Number of distinct source types (LinkedIn, PH, community, inbound) with ≥3 qualified leads each.
target_hint: ≥2 sources for launch week outbound; 1 source OK for manual seed phase.

name: review_to_outreach_conversion
definition: Candidates the user approved for outreach divided by candidates presented.
target_hint: ≥50% approval means research quality is high; <25% means scoring too loose.
